calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: A James Robertson, III; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-16-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: JILL BATES-MOORE, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING for Plaintiff. COUNSEL REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT THE CASE SETTLED. The Order to Show Cause pursuant to CRC 3.1385 is set to May-16-2017 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)
